mapper.sql: select ledger_id, groupid, subject_id, period, begin_balance, begin_direction, debit_total, credit_total, end_balance, end_direction, created_time, updated_time from fin_general_ledger
mapper.select:
select fgl.ledger_id ledgerId, fgl.groupid, fgl.subject_id subjectId, s.subject_name subjectName, fgl.period, fgl.begin_balance beginBalance, fgl.begin_direction beginDirection, fgl.debit_total debitTotal, fgl.credit_total creditTotal, fgl.end_balance endBalance, fgl.end_direction endDirection, fgl.created_time createdTime, fgl.updated_time from fin_general_ledger fgl left join fin_accounting_subjects s on s.subject_id=fgl.subject_id
and fgl.groupid = #{groupid} AND fgl.period >= #{startPeriod} AND fgl.period <= #{endPeriod} and fgl.subject_id = #{subjectId} and fgl.period = #{period}
where subject_id = #{subjectId} and period = #{period} and groupid = #{groupid}

select d.ledger_id, d.groupid, d.subject_id, d.period, d.begin_balance, d.begin_direction, d.debit_total, d.credit_total, d.end_balance, d.end_direction, d.created_time, d.updated_time from fin_general_ledger d left join fin_accounting_subjects s on d.subject_id = s.subject_id and d.groupid = s.groupid where s.subject_code = #{subjectCode} and d.period = #{period} and d.groupid = #{groupid}

select d.subject_id, d.period, d.begin_balance, d.begin_direction, d.debit_total, d.credit_total, d.end_balance, d.end_direction from fin_general_ledger d where d.groupid = #{groupid} and d.period = #{period}

select s.subject_code subjectCode, s.subject_name subjectName, s.subject_level subjectLevel, s.subject_type subjectType, d.period, d.begin_balance beginBalance, d.begin_direction beginDirection, d.debit_total debitTotal, d.credit_total creditTotal, d.end_balance endBalance, d.end_direction endDirection from fin_accounting_subjects s left join fin_general_ledger d on s.subject_id=d.subject_id and s.groupid=d.groupid and d.period = #{period} where s.groupid = #{groupid}
mapper.insert:
insert into fin_general_ledger
groupid, subject_id, period, begin_balance, begin_direction, debit_total, credit_total, end_balance, end_direction, created_time, updated_time,
#{groupid}, #{subjectId}, #{period}, #{beginBalance}, #{beginDirection}, #{debitTotal}, #{creditTotal}, #{endBalance}, #{endDirection}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from fin_general_ledger where ledger_id in
#{ledgerId}
delete from fin_general_ledger where groupid = #{groupid} and period = #{period}
mapper.select:
SELECT top_subject.subject_id as subjectId, top_subject.subject_code as subjectCode, top_subject.subject_name as subjectName, fgl.period as period, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.begin_balance), 0) as beginBalance, CASE WHEN SUM(fgl.begin_balance) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN SUM(fgl.begin_balance) < 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as beginDirection, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.debit_total), 0) as debitTotal, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.credit_total), 0) as creditTotal, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.end_balance), 0) as endBalance, CASE WHEN SUM(fgl.end_balance) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN SUM(fgl.end_balance) < 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as endDirection FROM fin_accounting_subjects top_subject INNER JOIN fin_accounting_subjects child_subject ON child_subject.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND child_subject.subject_code LIKE CONCAT(top_subject.subject_code, '%') LEFT JOIN fin_general_ledger fgl ON fgl.subject_id = child_subject.subject_id AND fgl.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND fgl.period >= #{startPeriod} AND fgl.period <= #{endPeriod} WHERE top_subject.groupid = #{groupid} AND (top_subject.parent_code IS NULL OR top_subject.parent_code = '' OR top_subject.subject_level = 1)
AND top_subject.subject_code IN
#{code}
GROUP BY top_subject.subject_id, top_subject.subject_code, top_subject.subject_name, fgl.period HAVING SUM(fgl.debit_total) IS NOT NULL OR SUM(fgl.credit_total) IS NOT NULL OR SUM(fgl.end_balance) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY top_subject.subject_code, fgl.period

SELECT top_subject.subject_id as subjectId, top_subject.subject_code as subjectCode, top_subject.subject_name as subjectName, fgl.period as period, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.begin_balance), 0) as beginBalance, CASE WHEN SUM(fgl.begin_balance) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN SUM(fgl.begin_balance) < 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as beginDirection, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.debit_total), 0) as debitTotal, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.credit_total), 0) as creditTotal, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.end_balance), 0) as endBalance, CASE WHEN SUM(fgl.end_balance) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN SUM(fgl.end_balance) < 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as endDirection FROM fin_accounting_subjects top_subject INNER JOIN fin_accounting_subjects child_subject ON child_subject.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND child_subject.subject_code LIKE CONCAT(top_subject.subject_code, '%') INNER JOIN fin_general_ledger fgl ON fgl.subject_id = child_subject.subject_id AND fgl.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND fgl.period = #{period} WHERE top_subject.groupid = #{groupid} AND (top_subject.parent_code IS NULL OR top_subject.parent_code = '' OR top_subject.subject_level = 1) GROUP BY top_subject.subject_id, top_subject.subject_code, top_subject.subject_name, fgl.period HAVING SUM(fgl.end_balance) IS NOT NULL AND SUM(fgl.end_balance) != 0 ORDER BY top_subject.subject_code, fgl.period

SELECT t.subjectId, t.subjectCode, t.subjectName, t.period, t.endBalance, t.endDirection FROM ( SELECT top_subject.subject_id as subjectId, top_subject.subject_code as subjectCode, top_subject.subject_name as subjectName, fgl.period as period, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.end_balance), 0) as endBalance, CASE WHEN SUM(fgl.end_balance) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN SUM(fgl.end_balance) < 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as endDirection, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY top_subject.subject_id ORDER BY fgl.period DESC) as rn FROM fin_accounting_subjects top_subject INNER JOIN fin_accounting_subjects child_subject ON child_subject.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND child_subject.subject_code LIKE CONCAT(top_subject.subject_code, '%') INNER JOIN fin_general_ledger fgl ON fgl.subject_id = child_subject.subject_id AND fgl.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND fgl.period >= #{startPeriod} AND fgl.period <= #{endPeriod} WHERE top_subject.groupid = #{groupid} AND (top_subject.parent_code IS NULL OR top_subject.parent_code = '' OR top_subject.subject_level = 1) GROUP BY top_subject.subject_id, top_subject.subject_code, top_subject.subject_name, fgl.period HAVING IFNULL(SUM(fgl.end_balance), 0) != 0 ) t WHERE t.rn = 1 ORDER BY t.subjectCode

SELECT top_subject.subject_id as subjectId, top_subject.subject_code as subjectCode, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.debit_total), 0) as cumulativeDebit, IFNULL(SUM(fgl.credit_total), 0) as cumulativeCredit FROM fin_accounting_subjects top_subject INNER JOIN fin_accounting_subjects child_subject ON child_subject.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND child_subject.subject_code LIKE CONCAT(top_subject.subject_code, '%') INNER JOIN fin_general_ledger fgl ON fgl.subject_id = child_subject.subject_id AND fgl.groupid = top_subject.groupid AND fgl.period >= #{startPeriod} AND fgl.period <= #{endPeriod} WHERE top_subject.groupid = #{groupid} AND (top_subject.parent_code IS NULL OR top_subject.parent_code = '' OR top_subject.subject_level = 1) GROUP BY top_subject.subject_id, top_subject.subject_code ORDER BY top_subject.subject_code

SELECT e.subject_id AS subjectId, DATE_FORMAT(v.voucher_date, '%Y%m') AS period, IFNULL(SUM(e.debit_amount), 0) AS debitTotal, IFNULL(SUM(e.credit_amount), 0) AS creditTotal FROM fin_voucher_entries e INNER JOIN fin_vouchers v ON e.voucher_id = v.voucher_id WHERE e.groupid = #{groupid} GROUP BY e.subject_id, DATE_FORMAT(v.voucher_date, '%Y%m') ORDER BY e.subject_id, period
